Circumference scale: cardinal compass directions

Source: R/circumference_labs.R
scale_cardinal.Rd

Circumference scale: cardinal compass directions

Usage

scale_cardinal(points = 4)

Arguments

points

`4` (N/E/S/W, default) or `8` (adds the intercardinals NE/SE/SW/NW).

Value

A circumference-scale list for [circumference_labs()].

See also

[circumference_labs()], [scale_clock()], [scale_months()], [scale_seconds()]

Examples

scale_cardinal(points = 8)
#> $n
#> [1] 8
#> 
#> $at
#> [1] 1.5707963 0.7853982 0.0000000 5.4977871 4.7123890 3.9269908 3.1415927
#> [8] 2.3561945
#> 
#> $labels
#> [1] "N"  "NE" "E"  "SE" "S"  "SW" "W"  "NW"
#> 
#> $name
#> [1] "cardinal"
#>

On this page
